title: Holistic Impact Assessment
description: Canonical specialist for rename, refactor, schema, and dependency impact analysis.
scope_boundary: In scope: impact-analysis workflow and output discipline. Out of scope: carrying out the code change unless separately requested.

stable_facts.statement: Never conclude non-trivial impact from a single file or grep hit alone.
Separate direct edits from impacted consumers and generated sources.
Run a contradiction check before finalizing the impact answer.
